title: Software Update - DFU - Three easy steps screen
scenario: Verify that after pairing the headset and starting the app, navigating to Device Settings > Software Update, tapping Update and Continue, the "Three easy steps" screen with picture, instructions, and an active Start Update button is displayed.
steps: Pair the headset with the device.
Navigate to Device Settings > Software Update.
expected: The "Three easy steps" title screen is displayed with a picture and textual instructions, and the Start Update button is available and active.
